category_sources: source_facts.description says secure storage and execution of environments; official GitHub README describes vaults of secrets and spawning sessions with those secrets.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vaulted; official GitHub repository README title is vaulted.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, getting started, file locations, integration notes, and command usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/miquella/vaulted, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists vaulted; official README says vaults can contain environment variables, AWS credentials, and SSH keys, and GitHub reports Go as the language.
